title: pimpinella gouanii
intro: Pimpinella gouanii, also known as Ajwain or Carom seed, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family and is native to India, China, and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pimpinella gouanii include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety levels. Herbal preparations of Pimpinella gouanii can be consumed as tea, capsule, or oil, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
